---
name: 🔬 Research & Scientific Enhancement
about: Propose scientific updates, new validation cases, or literature-based parameter improvements.
title: "[SCIENCE] "
labels: science, research
assignees: ''
---

**Scientific Basis**
Describe the physics, chemistry, or mathematical equation changes proposed. Cite DOIs where applicable.

**Validation Baseline**
Which of the 5 canonical validation cases does this impact, or does it introduce a new case?
- [ ] Case 1 (CO₂ hydration)
- [ ] Case 2 (CaCO₃ precipitation)
- [ ] Case 3 (Gypsum equilibrium)
- [ ] Case 4 (SO₂ scrubbing)
- [ ] Case 5 (Heavy metal sorption)
- [ ] New validation case proposal

**Proposed Formulation/Parameters**
Describe the math, parameter values, or Arrhenius/Michaelis-Menten kinetic equations to be updated.

**Expected impact on simulations**
What changes do you predict in simulation outputs (NPV, compaction strength, capture efficiency)?
